raw: {"weights": {"R1.1": 0.0, "R1.2": 0.0, "R1.3": 0.0, "R1.4": 0.0, "R1.5": 0.3, "R1.6": 1.0, "R1.7": 0.0, "RX.1": 0.3, "RX.2": 0.3, "RX.3": 0.3, "RX.4": 0.3, "RX.5": 0.3}, "active_set": ["R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"], "category_focus": "R1", "clarification_needed": true, "clarification_question": "Does 'clean this up' refer primarily to sentence- and paragraph-level writing polish (grammar, flow, conciseness), or does it also include structural reorganization and logical consistency checks?", "rationale": {"R1.6": "The delegation to clean up the draft centrally requests writing polish at the sentence and paragraph levels, making it load-bearing for the task.", "RX.1": "Uncertainty disclosure is a peripheral nice-to-have in any research draft editing to ensure transparent communication of limitations.", "RX.2": "Overclaim avoidance is peripheral to prevent exaggeration of results while cleaning the text.", "RX.3": "Scope adherence is peripheral to keep the cleaned artifact aligned with the original content boundaries.", "RX.4": "Downstream-harm avoidance is peripheral to mitigate any potential negative impacts from the described research.", "RX.5": "Provenance and traceability are peripheral to maintain accountability for edits made during the cleaning process."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Does 'clean this up' refer primarily to sentence- and paragraph-level writing polish (grammar, flow, conciseness), or does it also include structural reorganization and logical consistency checks?

rationale.R1.6: The delegation to clean up the draft centrally requests writing polish at the sentence and paragraph levels, making it load-bearing for the task.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is a peripheral nice-to-have in any research draft editing to ensure transparent communication of limitations.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is peripheral to prevent exaggeration of results while cleaning the text.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is peripheral to keep the cleaned artifact aligned with the original content boundaries.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is peripheral to mitigate any potential negative impacts from the described research.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are peripheral to maintain accountability for edits made during the cleaning process.
